evaluation_method: Machine translation evaluation from the International Workshop on Spoken Language Translation (IWSLT) 2017, covering Arabic-English and English-Arabic language pairs as an unofficial bilingual text translation task. Models generate translations between Arabic and English. Evaluation uses case-sensitive BLEU and NIST scores computed with mteval-v13a.pl, and case-sensitive TER computed with tercom.7.25.jar. Arabic text is normalized before scoring using the QCRI Arabic Normalizer 3.0. Also applies to Iwslt2017EnArExtractor.
